title: Tokenizer Encoding & Decoding Flow
initialization_flow: NO  → defer; tokenizer loaded on-demand inside _run_model_with_offload
encoding_flow: [V2W variant] → get_condition_latent(model, path, num_input_frames, state_shape) → latent
[MultiviewV2W variant] → get_condition_latent_multiview(model, path, num_input_frames, state_shape) → (condition_latent, condition_frames)
[Interpolator variant] → get_condition_latent(model, path, num_input_frames, state_shape, frame_index, frame_stride) → latent (iterates over frame pairs in loop)
RETURN: condition_latent tensor used as conditioning for diffusion model
decoding_flow: NORMALIZE: (1.0 + raw).clamp(0,2) / 2  →  [B, 3, T, H, W] in [0,1]
[Multiview variant] additionally rearranges views into 2x3 grid via einops
RETURN: np.ndarray uint8 [T, H, W, C]  (or [grid_video, video] for multiview)
offload_flow: Called after decoding completes when offload_tokenizer=True

key_method_signatures._load_tokenizer: def _load_tokenizer(self) -> None  [base: no-op; diffusion subclass: load_tokenizer_model(model, path)]
key_method_signatures._offload_tokenizer: def _offload_tokenizer(self) -> None  [base: del model.tokenizer; gc; cuda empty_cache]
key_method_signatures._run_tokenizer_encoding_multiview: def _run_tokenizer_encoding(self, image_or_video_path: str, state_shape: list) -> Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]
key_method_signatures._run_tokenizer_encoding_interpolator: def _run_tokenizer_encoding(self, image_or_video_path: str, frame_index: int=0, frame_stride: int=1) -> torch.Tensor
key_method_signatures._run_tokenizer_decoding: def _run_tokenizer_decoding(self, sample: torch.Tensor) -> np.ndarray  [input: [B,C,T,H,W]; output: uint8 [T,H,W,C]]

key_relationships: DiffusionText2WorldGenerationPipeline extends BaseWorldGenerationPipeline — no _run_tokenizer_encoding (T2W only decodes)
DiffusionWorldInterpolatorGenerationPipeline extends DiffusionVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline — overrides _run_tokenizer_encoding with frame_index/stride; loops over frame pairs
model.tokenizer: spatial_compression_factor used to compute H,W from state_shape in interpolator
Tokenizer checkpoint: Cosmos-Tokenize1-CV8x8x8-720p (8x temporal, 8x8 spatial compression)
branching_conditions: offload_tokenizer=True → load on demand before encode, offload after decode
offload_tokenizer=False → tokenizer stays on GPU (loaded at init)
T2W pipeline → no encoding phase (pure text-to-video, decode only)
V2W/multiview pipeline → encoding required before diffusion
Interpolator pipeline → encoding runs in loop per frame pair (frame_index_start to num_frame_pairs)
Multiview decode → einops rearrange into 2x3 grid; returns [grid_video, video]

data_types.condition_latent: torch.Tensor — conditioned input to diffusion model
data_types.sample: torch.Tensor [B, C, T, H, W] — raw diffusion output
data_types.decoded_video: np.ndarray uint8 [T, H, W, C] in range [0, 255]

important_notes: Tokenizer is Cosmos-Tokenize1-CV8x8x8-720p (8x temporal, 8x8 spatial). Encoding converts video frames to latent space; decoding applies model.decode() + normalize + cast to uint8. T2W pipelines skip encoding entirely. Memory offloading (offload_tokenizer flag) controls whether tokenizer stays on GPU. Interpolator pipeline iterates encoding per frame pair then concatenates outputs, skipping first frame of subsequent segments to avoid duplication.
